revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:What links here]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:What links here]]</includeonly>

<includeonly>{{Plain link|url={{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere|target={{urlencode:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{ff|0}}}}}}}}}|all||&ff={{ffNUMBER:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{ff|0}}}}}}}}}:A}}&limit={{{limit|50}}}}}{{{extraparams|}}}}}|name={{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|Pages that link to "{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}"{{#ifeq:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{ff|}}}}}}}}}|all|<nowiki /> in all ffs|{{#if:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{ff|}}}}}}}}}|<nowiki /> in ff "{{{3|{{{ns|{{{ff|}}}}}}}}}"}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Plain link|url={{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere|target={{urlencode:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|0}}}}}}}}}|all||&namespace={{NAMESPACENUMBER:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|0}}}}}}}}}:A}}&limit={{{limit|50}}}}}{{{extraparams|}}}}}|name={{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|Pages that link to "{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}"{{#ifeq:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|}}}}}}}}}|all|<nowiki /> in all namespaces|{{#if:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|}}}}}}}}}|<nowiki /> in namespace "{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|}}}}}}}}}"}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing automatically generrated pages
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:What links here]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:What links here]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:What links here]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:What links here]]</includeonly>

<includeonly>{{Plain link|url={{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere|target={{urlencode:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|0}}}}}}}}}|all||&namespace={{NAMESPACENUMBER:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|0}}}}}}}}}:A}}&limit={{{limit|50}}}}}{{{extraparams|}}}}}|name={{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|Pages that link to "{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}"{{#ifeq:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|}}}}}}}}}|all|<nowiki /> in all namespaces|{{#if:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|}}}}}}}}}|<nowiki /> in namespace "{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|}}}}}}}}}"}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{Plain link|url={{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere|target={{urlencode:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|0}}}}}}}}}|all||&namespace={{NAMESPACENUMBER:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|0}}}}}}}}}:A}}&limit={{{limit|50}}}}}{{{extraparams|}}}}}|name={{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|Pages that link to "{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}"{{#ifeq:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|}}}}}}}}}|all|<nowiki /> in all namespaces|{{#if:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|}}}}}}}}}|<nowiki /> in namespace "{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|}}}}}}}}}"}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Plain link|url={{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere|target={{urlencode:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|0}}}}}}}}}|all||&namespace={{NAMESPACENUMBER:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|0}}}}}}}}}:A}}&limit={{{limit|50}}}}}{{{extraparams|}}}}}|name={{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}}|Pages that link to "{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}"{{#ifeq:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|}}}}}}}}}|all|<nowiki /> in all namespaces|{{#if:{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|}}}}}}}}}|<nowiki /> in namespace "{{{3|{{{ns|{{{namespace|}}}}}}}}}"}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
